{{Quote|We got company, Captain.|Chief Alta Dayson|<ref name="The DarkStryder Campaign">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Traitor in our Midst|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref>}}
[[Chief/Legends|Chief]] '''Alta Dayson''' was a member of the crew of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. She served as a sensor [[Technician/Legends|technician]], and was on duty during the [[Battle of Galtea]].

{{Char-stub}}
